segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: Thanks for joining. I saw your team just raised Series B — congrats.

segments.speaker: prospect
segments.text: Thanks! Yeah, we're hiring like crazy right now.

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: That's usually when onboarding becomes a bottleneck. How are you handling new eng ramp-up?

segments.speaker: prospect
segments.text: It's painful honestly. Seniors spend weeks onboarding each new hire.

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: That's exactly what Devin helps with. Can I show you a quick example?

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: Appreciate you taking the time. How's your team thinking about developer productivity?

segments.speaker: prospect
segments.text: We already have Copilot Enterprise. Not sure we need another tool.

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: Totally fair. Copilot is great for autocomplete. Devin is different — it takes a whole ticket.

segments.speaker: prospect
segments.text: I don't know, our devs are pretty set in their ways.

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: What if I showed you a side-by-side on one of your real tickets?

segments.speaker: prospect
segments.text: Maybe. Send me something and I'll look at it.

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: Hi — we had you on the calendar for 2pm, wanted to check in.

segments.speaker: prospect
segments.text: Oh man, I'm so sorry. Got pulled into a fire drill.

segments.speaker: rep
segments.text: No worries at all. How's Thursday at the same time?
